from fastapi import FastAPI
from langchain.prompts import PromptTemplate
from langchain.llms import OpenAI

app = FastAPI()

llm = OpenAI(temperature=0)

summarize_prompt = PromptTemplate(
    input_variables=["text"],
    template="Summarize the following:\n{text}",
)
summarize_chain = summarize_prompt | llm

translate_prompt = PromptTemplate(
    input_variables=["text", "lang"],
    template="Translate to {lang}:\n{text}",
)
translate_chain = translate_prompt | llm


@app.post("/summarize")
async def summarize(text: str):
    result = summarize_chain.invoke({"text": text})
    return {"summary": result}


@app.post("/translate")
async def translate(text: str, target_lang: str):
    result = translate_chain.invoke({"text": text, "lang": target_lang})
    return {"translation": result}
